summary: The diff implements a comprehensive visual theme refresh across the frontend matching REQ-20. All major pages (IndexPage, GeneratePage, GalleryPage, CreditsPage, AdminPage) and supporting components have been updated with dark gradient backgrounds, glassmorphism surfaces, amber/emerald/gold accent colors, sharp typography, and neon-glow hover effects. No blue or purple colors are present in the palette. The implementation appears thorough and consistent with the acceptance criteria.
